title: Linear Mixer of Clocks
label: ug_mix_linear-clocks
chain: MixLinear(input_count=4, output_count=2) => mix &> Fade(channels=2) => mlevel | Clock(rate=20, mode=Samples) ->:in1 mix | Clock(rate=33, mode=Samples) ->:in2 mix | Clock(rate=13, mode=Samples) ->:in3 mix | Clock(rate=45, mode=Samples) ->:in4 mix | Lfo(rate=12, mode=Samples, wave=Sine) ->:level1 mix | Lfo(rate=30, mode=Samples, wave=Square) ->:pan2 mix | Lfo(rate=25, mode=Samples, wave=Triangle) ->:level3 mix | Lfo(rate=12, mode=Samples, wave=Triangle) ->:pan4 mix
